selections.name: Loco Coco
selections.reason: Draws the inside rail and projects as the lone 'E' speed. Fits the Thistledown inside sprint bias perfectly.

selections.name: Lizzy's Dream
selections.reason: Consistent presser with a solid 96 class rating. Will get first run if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Commissioner D
selections.reason: Boasts the highest base speed figure in the field (88) but steps up slightly in class.

selections.name: Fortheloveofbonnie
selections.reason: Solid class rating of 91 and capable of closing into a contested pace.

danger_horse.name: Drill Blitz
danger_horse.reason: Takes a class drop and has back speed figures that make her dangerous at a price.

selections.name: Frosty Paws
selections.reason: Tops the field with a 100 speed figure and an 86 class rating. Outside draw keeps him out of trouble.

selections.name: Aye Aye Sir
selections.reason: Matches the top speed figure of 100 and has solid back class. Major threat.

selections.name: Bourbon On Fire
selections.reason: Consistent 97 speed figure and an 84 class rating. Reliable underneath.

selections.name: Little Vaquero
selections.reason: Speed figures are right there with the top contenders; should get a good stalking trip.

danger_horse.name: Bucket List
danger_horse.reason: Drawn well inside and has flashed enough early speed to be a factor.

selections.name: Whiskey Point
selections.reason: BEST BET - Golden Gap overlay. Massive 98 class rating and 97 speed figure. Drops from tougher maiden special weight company.

selections.name: Kukuk
selections.reason: Clear second best on paper with a 94 speed figure. The logical alternative if the favorite stubs his toe.

selections.name: Usain Th (uru)
selections.reason: Consistent runner with an 88 speed figure. Good for exotic underneath spots.

selections.name: Captain Carney
selections.reason: First-time starter drawing the rail. Wildcard potential in a weak field behind the top two.

danger_horse.name: Codec
danger_horse.reason: Could pick up the pieces late if the pace is too hot.

selections.name: Rock The Red
selections.reason: Top speed figure in the field (101) and draws favorably on the outside to stalk and pounce.

selections.name: Express Cruiser
selections.reason: Classy runner with a 95 class rating and 100 speed. Will be right there at the wire.

selections.name: Stay Thirsty Amigo
selections.reason: Solid 97 speed figure and capable of pressing the pace.

selections.name: Star Weaver
selections.reason: Has back class and a 94 speed figure. Can hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Sunset Town
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and an 81 class rating make him a threat to steal a share.

selections.name: Angel I'm Not
selections.reason: Strong 88 speed and 84 class rating. Projects to get a perfect stalking trip.

selections.name: The Kid's Prayer
selections.reason: Matches the top speed figure (88) and has been facing solid company.

selections.name: Feeling Easy
selections.reason: Consistent presser with an 86 speed figure. Inside draw helps.

selections.name: Lady Loves Money
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (90). Dangerous if she runs back to her best.

danger_horse.name: Rosetta
danger_horse.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on her best day.

selections.name: Miss Classified
selections.reason: Massive speed advantage (95) over a field that mostly runs in the upper 80s. Clear standout.

selections.name: Sacred Connection
selections.reason: Rail draw in a route race is a plus. 88 speed figure makes her the logical second choice.

selections.name: Tiz Mia
selections.reason: Consistent 87 speed figure and an 81 class rating. Should be grinding late.

selections.name: Divine Fashion
selections.reason: Pace dependent but has the back numbers to hit the superfecta.

danger_horse.name: Beautiful Mandate
danger_horse.reason: Can mix it up early and hold on for a minor award.

selections.name: It's Browns Time
selections.reason: Highest class rating (99) and a strong 88 speed figure. Very tight field but gets the nod.

selections.name: Hot Princess
selections.reason: Matches the 88 speed figure and has a 97 class rating. Major player.

selections.name: Vertisalute
selections.reason: Right there on numbers (87 speed, 97 class). Will be flying late.

selections.name: Laketown Elly
selections.reason: Outside draw in a sprint is tough, but class (97) keeps her in the mix.

danger_horse.name: Midnight Goddess
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and 92 class rating make her a threat to wire the field.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Exacta Box 2-4, Trifecta Box 2-3-4, Superfecta 2,4 / 2,3,4 / 1,2,3,4,6 / ALL

selections.name: Kinderhook
selections.reason: Top speed figure (96) and co-top class rating (89). Looks primed for a big effort.

selections.name: Oaks Honey
selections.reason: Matches the 89 class rating and has a solid 92 speed figure. Outside draw is the only knock.

selections.name: Oklahoma Joe
selections.reason: Consistent 92 speed figure and an 87 class rating. Should get a good stalking trip.

selections.name: Into Gold
selections.reason: Has the speed (92) to compete but gives up a little on class (80).

danger_horse.name: General Winston
danger_horse.reason: Could sneak into the exotics if the pace collapses.
